records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I more desperate than usual?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I more desperate than usual?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I more desperate than usual?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it sympathy for the people who remind me of my past?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it sympathy for the people who remind me of my past?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it sympathy for the people who remind me of my past?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>So it is sometimes sought by those who wish to escape society and start a new life.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>So it is sometimes sought by those who wish to escape society and start a new life.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>So it is sometimes sought by those who wish to escape society and start a new life.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Everyone who could leave already left. The ones remaining are former slaves or natives.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Everyone who could leave already left. The ones remaining are former slaves or natives.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Everyone who could leave already left. The ones remaining are former slaves or natives.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or is it my desire to fulfill my duty as a Saintess?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or is it my desire to fulfill my duty as a Saintess?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or is it my desire to fulfill my duty as a Saintess?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be like you when I grow up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be like you when I grow up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be like you when I grow up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That Demon Lord won't stand a chance against you! Right, Your Holiness?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That Demon Lord won't stand a chance against you! Right, Your Holiness?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That Demon Lord won't stand a chance against you! Right, Your Holiness?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What matters is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What matters is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What matters is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I promised you, that I would save you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I promised you, that I would save you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I promised you, that I would save you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This staff is now yours, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This staff is now yours, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This staff is now yours, Lucrecia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I am the Saintess that he chose.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I am the Saintess that he chose.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I am the Saintess that he chose.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good job, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good job, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good job, Lucrecia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The monsters are all dead. You don't need to worry anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The monsters are all dead. You don't need to worry anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The monsters are all dead. You don't need to worry anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Savior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Savior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Savior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought... I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought... I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought... I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The village. What about the village?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The village. What about the village?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The village. What about the village?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... sorry. I tried to make it work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... sorry. I tried to make it work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... sorry. I tried to make it work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I guess it's pointless for a lowly slave to act like a Saintess...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I guess it's pointless for a lowly slave to act like a Saintess...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I guess it's pointless for a lowly slave to act like a Saintess...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did your best, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did your best, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did your best, Lucrecia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You are too kind, Savior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You are too kind, Savior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You are too kind, Savior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was the same when I first met you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was the same when I first met you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was the same when I first met you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You fought His Highness for a stranger like me, and named me the Saintess as you handed me the staff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You fought His Highness for a stranger like me, and named me the Saintess as you handed me the staff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You fought His Highness for a stranger like me, and named me the Saintess as you handed me the staff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lucrecia. You are not to blame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lucrecia. You are not to blame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lucrecia. You are not to blame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I. I was really happy when you handed me the staff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I. I was really happy when you handed me the staff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I. I was really happy when you handed me the staff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like my grandfather said, I thought I was saved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like my grandfather said, I thought I was saved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like my grandfather said, I thought I was saved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that, if I tried hard enough, I could have my happy ending...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that, if I tried hard enough, I could have my happy ending...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that, if I tried hard enough, I could have my happy ending...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I learned proper manners... I did what others wanted me to do. I changed how I spoke...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I learned proper manners... I did what others wanted me to do. I changed how I spoke...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I learned proper manners... I did what others wanted me to do. I changed how I spoke...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did all that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did all that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did all that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I still... couldn't be of any use to you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I still... couldn't be of any use to you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I still... couldn't be of any use to you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Savior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Savior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Savior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The chief mentioned the tradition of the selected man giving his partner an accessory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The chief mentioned the tradition of the selected man giving his partner an accessory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The chief mentioned the tradition of the selected man giving his partner an accessory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I made this hair pin myself. I hope you like it, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I made this hair pin myself. I hope you like it, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I made this hair pin myself. I hope you like it, Lucrecia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but. The festival is already over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but. The festival is already over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but. The festival is already over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of my incompetence...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of my incompetence...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of my incompetence...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. I guess it's a stretch to continue the festival in a situation like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. I guess it's a stretch to continue the festival in a situation like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. I guess it's a stretch to continue the festival in a situation like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'd like to say this outside of the festival and rite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'd like to say this outside of the festival and rite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'd like to say this outside of the festival and rite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lucrecia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May I have this dance?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May I have this dance?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I have this dance?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Of course.
